data.title: Michael Saylor Highlights Bitcoin's Importance for the Euro
data.description: According to PANews, Michael Saylor recently expressed on Twitter that the Euro (EUR) will require Bitcoin (BTC).

data.title: Upbit: No fees will be charged in the process of supporting digital asset transactions
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Upbit issued a statement saying that some media reported that it charged brokerage fees in the process of supporting digital asset transactions, so it clarified that Upbit does not charge any fees to ensure transaction support, but determines whether to provide transaction support based on the transaction support policy provided on the official website, including: accepting transaction support applications, preliminary/brief review, formal evaluation, transaction support review committee resolution, and providing transaction support. All procedures are directly performed by Upbit employees. 
Upbit also asked some media that mentioned that they needed to pay brokerage fees to provide evidence and materials for the list of related projects in order to actively cooperate with fact-checking and investigation.

data.title: Uranium Digital Completes $6.1 Million Seed Round Led by Framework Ventures
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Uranium Digital announced the completion of a $6.1 million seed round of financing, led by Framework Ventures. This financing will accelerate Uranium Digital's establishment of a uranium spot trading platform using crypto infrastructure as the backend, and promote the development of the "financialized" uranium spot market. (CoinDesk)

data.title: Analyst: Bitcoin and Ethereum ETFs show divergent capital flows
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News BRN analyst Valentin Fournier analyzed that the inflow rate of Bitcoin and Ethereum ETFs has slowed down, but this is not necessarily bad news, because overall trading activities are still active, but the inflow of funds for the two assets shows a divergent trend. For example, the inflow of funds into the Bitcoin ETF the day before was US$11.8 million, while the outflow of funds from the Ethereum ETF was US$11.7 million. Although the inflow of funds has temporarily decreased, the continued high trading volume indicates that market participation continues, rather than weakening interest. (Decrypt)

data.title: Kraken announces $1.5 billion acquisition of NinjaTrader
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Kraken announced the acquisition of US futures trading platform NinjaTrader for $1.5 billion. It can now provide digital asset futures and derivatives services in the United States because NinjaTrader has obtained CFTC registration. In addition, Kraken's regulatory licenses in the UK, EU and Australia will help NinjaTrader expand in these regions.

data.title: Bitcoin and Ethereum ETF Inflows Show Diverging Trends
data.description: According to Odaily, analyst Valentin Fournier has observed a slowdown in the inflow of Bitcoin and Ethereum ETFs. However, this is not necessarily negative, as overall trading activity remains robust. The two assets are experiencing divergent trends in fund flows, with Bitcoin ETFs seeing an inflow of $11.8 million, while Ethereum ETFs recorded an outflow of $11.7 million the previous day. Despite the temporary reduction in inflows, the sustained high trading volume indicates ongoing market engagement rather than a decline in interest.

data.title: Analysis: The US government's increase in BTC holdings may become a turning point in this cycle, supporting the market's bullish outlook
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The market's interest in U.S.-listed spot ETFs has rekindled, and Bitcoin ETFs have achieved a fourth consecutive day of positive capital inflows. Blockhead Research Network analysis pointed out: "Multiple catalysts continue to support Bitcoin's bullish outlook. The U.S. government is exploring budget-neutral ways to accumulate Bitcoin. This event may become a turning point in this cycle. In addition, the Chicago Mercantile Exchange's Solana futures have also become a major bullish indicator for SOL, as the product may increase institutional investment exposure to SOL." (CoinDesk)

data.title: BitMart launches siren(SIREN)
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, BitMart will launch siren (SIREN) at 21:00 (Eastern Time Zone 8) on March 20, and the SIREN/USDT trading pair will be opened.
SirenAIAgent is an artificial intelligence entity with a dual personality.

data.title: Renewed Interest in U.S. Bitcoin ETF Sparks Positive Inflows
data.description: According to Odaily, the market has rekindled its interest in U.S.-listed spot ETFs, with Bitcoin ETFs experiencing positive inflows for the fourth consecutive day. Blockhead Research Network analysts highlight several catalysts supporting Bitcoin's bullish outlook. The U.S. government is exploring budget-neutral methods to accumulate Bitcoin, which could mark a turning point in the current cycle. Additionally, Solana futures on the Chicago Mercantile Exchange have emerged as a key bullish indicator for SOL, potentially increasing institutional investment exposure to the cryptocurrency.

data.title: Swiss National Bank Maintains Stance Against Cryptocurrency Investments
data.description: According to Foresight News, Swiss National Bank President Martin Schlegel stated in an interview with Bloomberg that the central bank has no plans to invest in cryptocurrencies. Schlegel emphasized the bank's current position, indicating that digital assets are not part of their investment strategy.
